name: noc-bnotk-xnp
description: Runnable notary-side XNP gate with local reader-prompt preflight.

interface.shortDescription: Installable notary-side prerequisite for Online HRA.
interface.longDescription: Installable local Codex plugin for notaries and notary-office workstations. It gates Online HRA and other notary-side register workflows after the NoC Card SAK Gate has confirmed card-reader, BNotK SAK lite or XNP-card-path and secureFramework readiness. It now provides a runnable local reader-prompt preflight for the cyberJack reader path, then checks local XNP readiness, current local authentication and Amtstaetigkeitskontext attestation, XNotar/register-package handoff readiness, API-key presence attestation and evidence flow while keeping XNP credentials out of SaaS and Git.
defaultPrompt: Create a local XNP reader-prompt preflight for the cyberJack reader.
Create a local XNP authentication gate plan.
Validate XNotar handoff readiness without credential values.
